Nutrition Facts
Serving size 1 bottle (500ml)
Calories 120
Sodium 260mg
Total Sugars 26g
Includes 25g Added Sugars
Ingredients: Water, high fructose corn syrup, citric acid, sucralose, acesulfame potassium, artificial color, TBHQ.
Contains: Milk.
May contain traces of peanuts and tree nuts.
Made on equipment that also processes soy and sesame.
